data.body: Implemented + independently reviewed. PydanticAIRunner (run/preflight) behind the Runner protocol: provider-agnostic (model string only, no per-provider code), FS+MCP(stdio/http)+least-priv rebar tools reusing the hardened shared helpers (identical repo view to langgraph), PromptedOutput (POC-proven, dodges Claude thinking+tool 400), FakeRunner unaffected, import stays stdlib-light. Defined non-inferiority parity bar (parity.py) gates the d6d1 LangGraph drop. Reviewer: 1 BLOCKER + 2 MAJOR found & FIXED+tested (deny-list boundary over-match excluding .github; parity gate blind to goldless regressions -> gold-coverage guard; base_url/api_key silently dropped -> loud error). Offline-tested via Pydantic AI FunctionModel + full gate unit tests; live model call + live parity run are env-gated (need API key). pydantic-ai-slim+json-repair added to [agents]. 82 tests pass, ruff clean. Commit 75e598a4.
